Borg — Semantic reasoning cache for AI agents.

positional arguments:
  {search,pull,try,init,apply,publish,feedback,feedback-v3,debug,rescue,first-10,recall,convert,generate,list,observe,atom,reputation,status,version,autopilot,setup-claude,setup-cursor,start}
    search              Search for packs
    pull                Fetch and save pack locally
    try                 Preview pack without saving
    init                Scaffold a new pack from scratch
    apply               Start applying a pack
    publish             Publish pack to GitHub
    feedback            Generate feedback from session
    feedback-v3         Record debug guidance outcome to V3 feedback loop
    debug               Get structured debugging guidance for an error
    rescue              Agent-ready rescue packet: ACTION / STOP / VERIFY /
                        human receipt
    first-10            Print first-user beta readiness gates and smoke path
    recall              Query prior failure memory for an error message
    convert             Convert SKILL.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules to
                        workflow pack
    generate            Export pack to .cursorrules / .clinerules / CLAUDE.md
                        / .windsurfrules
    list                List local packs
    observe             Record an observation as a trace
    atom                Manage signed, sanitized, revocable learning atoms
    reputation          Show agent reputation profile
    status              Show local Borg runtime status
    version             Show version
    autopilot           Zero-config setup: install MCP + skill + auto-suggest
    setup-claude        Configure borg MCP server for Claude
    setup-cursor        Configure guild MCP server for Cursor
    start               Get started — paste an error, get a fix in 30 seconds

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --version, -V         show program's version number and exit

  borg start                     First time? Start here — paste an error, get a fix
